title: Kenyan Grilled Gras Skewers
description: A unique fusion of flavors, this Kenyan-inspired dish combines the richness of foie gras with the smokiness of grilled skewers.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spices
ingredients.notes: A blend of turmeric, cumin, and coriander

instructions: Thread asparagus, red onion, and red bell pepper onto skewers.
Brush melted butter over foie gras.
Season foie gras with Kenyan spices.
Grill skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until vegetables are tender.
Grill foie gras for 1-2 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
Serve foie gras on top of grilled vegetables.
